summary: Update Payment Application (Owner Invoice) Line Item for Prime Contract
description: Update a Payment Application (Owner Invoice) Line Item on a specified Prime Contract Payment Application (Owner Invoice)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Payment Application (Owner Invoice) Line item ID

total_completed_and_stored_to_date.description: Total completed and stored to date amount

total_completed_and_stored_to_date_perce.description: Total completed and stored to date percent

work_completed_from_previous_application.description: Work completed from previous application amount

total_completed_and_stored_to_date_quant.description: Total completed and stored to date quantity

work_completed_from_previous_application.description: Work completed from previous application quantity

work_completed_retainage_currently_retai.description: Work completed retainage currently retained amount

work_completed_retainage_from_previous_a.description: Work completed retainage amount from previous application

work_completed_retainage_released_this_p.description: Work completed retainage amount released this period

work_completed_retainage_retained_this_p.description: Work completed retainage amount retained this period

work_completed_retainage_percent_this_pe.description: Work completed retainage percent this period

materials_stored_retainage_currently_ret.description: Materials stored retainage amount currently retained

materials_stored_retainage_from_previous.description: Materials stored retainage amount from previous application

materials_stored_retainage_released_this.description: Materials stored retainage amount released this period

materials_stored_retainage_retained_this.description: Materials stored retainage amount retained this period

materials_stored_retainage_percent_this_.description: Materials stored retainage percent this period

total_retainage_from_previous_applicatio.description: Total retainage amount from previous application

work_completed_this_period.description: The amount of work completed this period (only for lines that use amount accounting or are calculated manually)

materials_presently_stored.description: The amount of materials presently stored (only for lines that use amount accounting)

work_completed_retainage_retained_this_p.description: Work completed retainage amount retained this period (work_completed_this_period should be non-zero to hold a retainage)

materials_stored_retainage_retained_this.description: Materials stored retainage amount retained this period (materials_presently_stored should be non-zero to hold a retainage)

work_completed_retainage_released_this_p.description: The amount of work completed retainage released this period

work_completed_this_period_quantity.description: Work completed this period quantity (only for lines that use unit accounting and are not calculated manually)
